meta.ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances & Pensions, Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances
meta.deliverables: Monitoring progress on SCDPM Portal, analytics of data received on SCDPM Portal, drafting agenda for monthly review meetings of all ministries/departments by DARPG, preparation of presentations or reports on update and progress of ministries/departments on SCDPM, analysis of best practices from ministries/departments on monthly basis, preparation of second special campaign.

content.full_text: The Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances (DARPG) under the Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances & Pensions issued a work order dated 10th August 2022 to Quality Council of India (QCI) for establishing a Project Monitoring Unit (PMU) for a Special Campaign. The engagement involves monitoring and analytics of the SCDPM Portal, drafting monthly review meeting agendas, preparing presentations/reports, analyzing best practices, and preparing for a second special campaign. The total cost is Rs. 30,24,000/- with payment milestones at 25% on award, 25% after 3 months, and 50% after 6 months. The services may be discontinued if unsatisfactory.
